allow: Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap')
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fireb\\Documents\\Skald\\src-tauri"; cargo build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "^error|error\\[|Compiling skald|Finished" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC\\14.51.36231\\bin\\Hostx64\\x64\\dumpbin.exe" /DELAYIMPORTS "c:\\Users\\fireb\\Documents\\Skald\\src-tauri\\target\\debug\\skald.exe" 2>&1 | Select-String "libvlc" | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fireb\\Documents\\Skald"; pnpm build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|warning|built in" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "skald","node","cargo" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "cargo" -or $_.MainWindowTitle -ne "" } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle; netstat -ano | findstr ":1420")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "skald","node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "skald" -or \($_.Name -eq "node" -and \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":1420" | Select-String $_.Id.ToString\(\)\)\) } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; netstat -ano | findstr "LISTENING" | findstr ":1420")

PowerShell($pid1420 = \(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":1420" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid1420\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid1420 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process -Name "skald" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell($pid1420 = \(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":1420" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid1420\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid1420 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process -Name "skald" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "clear")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "C:\\Users\\fireb\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\skald_layout.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Saved to $path")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/advplyr/audiobookshelf/contents/server/models/Book.js"; $b64 = $r.content -replace "`n","" -replace "`r",""; $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([System.Convert]::FromBase64String\($b64\)\); $lines = $content -split "`n"; $idx = 0; foreach \($l in $lines\) { $idx++; if \($l -match "getTracklist|tracklist|contentUrl|startOffset|AudioTrack"\) { Write-Output "${idx}: $l" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $screen.Width, $screen.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); # Crop to top nav area \(y: 44-80 px scaled to screen\); $cropBmp = $bmp.Clone\([System.Drawing.Rectangle]::FromLTRB\(0, 0, $screen.Width, 100\), $bmp.PixelFormat\); $cropBmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\fireb\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\verify_topnav.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $cropBmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Done")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $screen.Width, $screen.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, 0, $screen.Width, 120\); $crop = $bmp.Clone\($rect, $bmp.PixelFormat\); $path = "$env:TEMP\\verify_topnav.png"; $crop.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $crop.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Saved to $path")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $s.Width, $s.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($s.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $s.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\skald_state.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Done $\($s.Width\)x$\($s.Height\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowHandle -ne 0 } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $s.Width, $s.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($s.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $s.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\skald_list.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Done")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $s.Width, $s.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($s.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $s.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\skald_list2.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Done")
